data.content: Approved implementation review. The history detail panel now routes through shared metadata rendering so description is always visible and steps/state history, notes, and handoff capsules are shown behind the disclosure toggle; retakes reuse the same metadata details component. Verified in /Users/cartine/foolery/work/foolery-ee66 with bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
